case_title: PENNSYLVANIA DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE VS. SWYFT, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENNSYLVANIA DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWYFT, INC. $35,802.09 PRINCIPAL, $3,807.77 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,044.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
